mapper.sql: sa.id, sa.record_id, sa.question_id, sa.type_id, sa.student_answer, sa.correct_answer, sa.score, sa.get_score, sa.is_correct, sa.comment, sa.create_time, sa.update_time, qt.name as type_name
mapper.select: select from student_answer sa left join question_type qt on sa.type_id = qt.id where sa.id = #{id}
select from student_answer sa left join question_type qt on sa.type_id = qt.id where sa.record_id = #{recordId} order by sa.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into student_answer(record_id, question_id, type_id, student_answer, correct_answer, score, get_score, is_correct, comment) values(#{recordId}, #{questionId}, #{typeId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{score}, #{getScore}, #{isCorrect}, #{comment})

insert into student_answer(record_id, question_id, type_id, student_answer, correct_answer, score, get_score, is_correct, comment) values
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.typeId}, #{item.studentAnswer}, #{item.correctAnswer}, #{item.score}, #{item.getScore}, #{item.isCorrect}, #{item.comment})
